name: Minsk Region (Belarus)

colors.symbolism: the golden shield of the arms
the wavy bars of water on the shield

description: A red field bearing the coat of arms of Minsk Region: a golden shield with blue wavy bars and a central figure, ensigned with a mural crown and flanked by golden oak and blue ribbons.
history: Minsk Region (Minsk Voblast) is the central region of Belarus; it surrounds but does not include the capital city of Minsk, which is a separate administrative unit. Its flag, the regional arms on a red field, was adopted in 2007.
